title: caricina elongata
intro: Caricina elongata, also known as the Carica papaya variety elongata, is a type of papaya plant that has elongated fruits and is native to Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of vitamins A and C, and potassium. The health benefits of Caricina elongata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve pain, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, juices, and extracts for consumption, as well as used topically in creams and salves for skin conditions and wounds.
